faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Vandayar Engineering College as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: Vandayar Engineering College is a renowned institution offering M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. faqs.question: Which courses does Vandayar Engineering College offer?
faqs.answer: Vandayar Engineering College provides programmes including M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech in streams such as Engineering, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, VLSI Design, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: The worst college for engineering.

review_content.Placements: There are no camps interview programmes at Vandayar Engineering College. They started engineering in 2013, and till the last year, there was no campus interview conducted. Even there is no internship programme conducted for any of the batches. If we try to get permission for the internship, they will not provide permission. From 2013 to till today, none of the students got internship and job by the institution.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no enough lab facilities. Computer lab doesn't have enough computers, each system is shared by 2 or 3 students. Chemistry lab is not properly setup. There is no separate physics lab. Civil students of 2014 batch struggled a lot because of no proper lab instruments. There is no proper road inside the college. The worst hostel is provided.

content.Placements: 5-10% of students got placed here. 3.40 LPA is the maximum package, and 1.80 LPA is the minimum package offered. The infrastructure and facilities are good, and the facilities like Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms are good.  
The quality of hostel is good, and the food quality is moderate. The mess is moderate, and the canteen is good. Medical, sports and games facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members knowledge and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for placements and facilities. It offers a good campus environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good because of the open campus, and it is not conjusted. In labs, there is all equipment which provides more practical knowledge for students. Wi-Fi facility is also available for the students. All facilities are available in the hostel. reviews.review_heading: Completely satisfied with the faculty, Awesome placement till 2018 but It was not good for 2019.
reviews.review_text: 1. Wi-Fi, Library, AC Lab, Projector classrooms, Play ground, AC auditorium. 2 all the qualities of food, canteen medical sports and game was average. All the things were average but sometimes these can be best when are noticed by the chief. I believe keeping good is also the responsibility of the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college, but it tries to offer all the amenities that a big college offers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very nice. Labs are good to perform practicals. There are well air-conditioned computer labs with many facilities. There is a very big playground, and we also have a basketball court and volleyball court. Hostel facilities available here are decent, but the food offered in our mess and canteen is not that good. The management tries to fulfil all the needs of the students.

reviews.review_heading: A review of JNIT, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. There were separate buildings for each year. The classrooms are well-equipped and well-furnished. The library is quite good with a wide variety of books. There is a medical room, outdoor as well as an indoor sports complex, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for CS and IT departments.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There is an open field in our college. There is a separate building for the mechanical department. We have soccer,  baseball and volleyball courts in our college. The building structure is too good. There are ACs in all rooms. The classrooms are well-furnished. There is a projector in every class.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a LAN connection with good speed. There are different hostels for both boys and girls on the campus. It has a well-surrounded library. Medical facilities are also available. For sports & games, fields are also available. Food in the mess is not tasty.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied because of the crowd and placement for civil engineers.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure of the college is good. The labs aren't well equipped. The classrooms are hot and there is no Wi-Fi facility for the students. The canteen facilities are good, the hostel food is good but boring. The food routine is similar every week and the rotis are made using a machine.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied by college placements.
reviews.review_text: The labs are good, and I would give 4/5 for the infrastructure. The library is good, but the classrooms are not good. No medical facilities are available. Wi-Fi is unavailable. Sports and games facilities are not good. Canteen is the worst. I think the building of the college is best in Jaipur.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have a ground in our college. We have football ground, cricket ground, volleyball ground and we also have badminton ground. The classrooms are clean and are in good condition. We have a gym on the campus also.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities & low management.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure was good and having large campus as compared to other colleges. Classroom were good. Talking about library the quality and quantity of the books was good. Sports and Games facility wasn't that good for a day scholar, however hostler were the one who made most of sport and games. Labs were good enough to get practical knowledge but as mamgement does't allows to use after the lectures or when students want to do to enhance their knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: JNIT is the only college that organises fests in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-constructed. There are A/C classrooms, ducted corridor, secured parking and affiliated places. There are 5 cafeterias available. The college is close to tonk road which is the lifeline road of Jaipur. There is a covered parking facility. There are Amul shop, ICICI Bank, secured room as a locker room and individual garden for the first year students.

reviews.review_heading: In short and sweet this college is average for studying, placement and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The building structure of the college varies effectively, and the classrooms are very clean and comfortable, but poor Wi-Fi facility. The labs of the college are average as many labs provide good experiment knowledge, but in many labs lack instruments. Sports facility is average, and many games are played here like cricket, football, and volleyball, but sports is good for hostelers. In a year, the college organizes a sports week it's fantastic. The library facility in the college is good.

overview_faqs.answer: Bharath College of Engineering and Technology for Women is a renowned institution offering UG Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, After 10th Diploma. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Bharath College of Engineering and Technology for Women boasts an impressive review rating of 5 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 5 for Campus Life, 5 for Placements, 5 for Faculty, and 5 for Infrastructure.

The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology fee structure ranges between INR 70,000 to 1,72,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 8 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Structural Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for lateral students.

review_content.Placements: About 65% of students from our course got placed on the campus. The highest salary package offered in our institution is 5 LPA. Top reputed companies like Tech Mahindra and HGS visit our college for placements. The top role offered in our course is a mechanical engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides average facilities. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is good in the whole college. There is no canteen in the college. The college is away from the hospitals. The college also conducts sports for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I'm very much dissatisfied with the college. Lecturers, labs and infrastructure need to be improved.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements for my batch. Not only my batch, but my juniors also didn't get placements. This is the worst college I had seen. I suggest you not to join this college. Don't spoil your life. There is no placement officer, and no soft skill classes are conducted. Even the ECE and CSE students have no placements. Only BPO companies like HGS visit the campus to offer placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. The buildings, computer labs and library are being improved. The library has very less number of books, and the available books are very old and not updated.

Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology offers specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Structural Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses are available at Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology for students?

faqs.answer: Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

faqs.answer: Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology goes up to 744.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely do not join this college.

content.Placements: Here, there have been no placements since 4 years ago; I think they had good placements then. Currently, there are no placements, and 0% of students are placed here. I suggest that if you want good internals and good marks in the lab, join here. If you want skill and good infrastructure, join here.
content.Infrastructure: Here, there are NEET and clean classrooms, but a low percentage of students. There is no canteen, no medical facilities, no games, and no hostel for boys. However, attendance and lab marks will be good. I am sharing my total experience and have suffered more. This is good for those who take more absences.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for engineering.

content.Placements: 94% of students got placements. INR 24 LPA is the highest package. INR 8 LPA is the lowest package. The maximum number of students got jobs from CSE. There are different sections in the CSE branch—nearly 7 sections. There is no problem with placement; a talented student can definitely get a job.
content.Infrastructure: The college was superb, and it has a lot of blocks, and the CSE branch was the most demanded course in our college. Labs are always working with high-quality equipment and a Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are the most important place for every student. Those were superb, and you can choose them blindly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I'm very much dissatisfied with the college. Lecturers, labs and infrastructure need to be improved.

content.Placements: There were no placements for my batch. Not only my batch, but my juniors also didn't get placements. This is the worst college I had seen. I suggest you not to join this college. Don't spoil your life. There is no placement officer, and no soft skill classes are conducted. Even the ECE and CSE students have no placements. Only BPO companies like HGS visit the campus to offer placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. The buildings, computer labs and library are being improved. The library has very less number of books, and the available books are very old and not updated.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Chiranjeevi Reddy Engineering College is okay and not that bad.

content.Placements: When I joined in Chiranjeevi Reddy College, there is only one batch before me. So, they started placement cell from 2012, and most of them got placement letters, but there is an issue with companies, so most of them came back. They need to increase standards in education, and they also need to improve the placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The college needs to update labs and faculty members. There is no proper placement cell. We need soft skill trainers. There is project work. Standards of teaching staff are low. We also need to improve practicals. Management needs to concentration on staff and students. The classrooms are okay on the campus.

admission_process.title: Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 70,000 - 1,72,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 4 years.

faqs.question: How can I get into Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.MB

faqs.answer: Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Chiranjeevi Reddy Institute of Engineering and Technology goes up to 744.

facilities: You should be 12th passed with 45% marks.
You must appear for entrance exam which is Andhra Pradesh EAMCET.
Documents will be required like 10 and 12th marksheet, adhar card, passport size photo etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely do not join this college.
reviews.review_text: Here, there are NEET and clean classrooms, but a low percentage of students. There is no canteen, no medical facilities, no games, and no hostel for boys. However, attendance and lab marks will be good. I am sharing my total experience and have suffered more. This is good for those who take more absences.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college was superb, and it has a lot of blocks, and the CSE branch was the most demanded course in our college. Labs are always working with high-quality equipment and a Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are the most important place for every student. Those were superb, and you can choose them blindly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for lateral students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides average facilities. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is good in the whole college. There is no canteen in the college. The college is away from the hospitals. The college also conducts sports for the students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm very much dissatisfied with the college. Lecturers, labs and infrastructure need to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. The buildings, computer labs and library are being improved. The library has very less number of books, and the available books are very old and not updated.

reviews.review_heading: Chiranjeevi Reddy Engineering College is okay and not that bad.
reviews.review_text: The college needs to update labs and faculty members. There is no proper placement cell. We need soft skill trainers. There is project work. Standards of teaching staff are low. We also need to improve practicals. Management needs to concentration on staff and students. The classrooms are okay on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There is high-speed Wi-Fi facility available. The labs and classrooms are big and are of good quality too. Area of the library is very large, and plenty of books are available. The food available in our canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: A good place to learn well with high effective education.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure facilities in this institution with good staff. In this institution, we have all the facilities to get a better education. Here, we have the facilities like labs, library, sports, games, and some social activities with good qualities. So, it's a good place to get educated.

reviews.review_heading: Totally, just average in performance, not maintained well. First of all, the faculty is the worst.
reviews.review_text: Mobiles are strictly avoided in my college, so we don't need any Wi-Fi. Classrooms are messy and not good. Benches are also not good, and the library is a just a formality. They don't have any particular books, as they don't have the least first aid kit. Sports are not conducted here, and the equipment will not be good. The food here is not okay in the canteen, but a high price is collected. The hostel rooms are okay but are not maintained well.

reviews.review_heading: In 2014, the placements provided are the best on the campus.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The library in our college is good. Our college management provides the free Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are also not bad. In our college, there is a big ground, and they encourage the students in the sports. There are the medical facilities in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Only the faculty for my batch are good at teaching in the college.
reviews.review_text: My college provides good facilities. Everything is good like food, Wi-Fi facility and our college is famous for sports. And, our college canteen is very good in the whole Anantapur. The library has many books for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: There is a good library for our college. There is Wi-Fi in our college as well as in the hostel. There is a canteen for students. The quality of the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Zero placements. Highly disappointed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good at all. The hostel is fine but the food served is bad. There are no labs and during the inspections, the authorities convert classrooms into labs. There is no Wi-Fi. The library does not have enough books.

reviews.review_heading: I would like to say don't join this college.
reviews.review_text: There is a no wi-fi. Still the hostel buildings are constructing. It's not fully set up college. In one campus they have kept 3 engineering colleges and they are conducting classes for all this 3 colleges in one college. Same lab and faculty for all 3 colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Good knowledge of the campus in technical support education.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is really good and better for study. Faculty and staff are very nice. No disturbance any other way around the campus, Nice labs computer & electronic & civil. Most of the creative industries tie-ups with this college and chairman of the college very good.

reviews.review_heading: This college focuses on earning money.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very neat and good here. There is a good canteen, and the library is huge. In the library, all books are available, and Wi-Fi is available here. But they didn't share the password with students. They conduct games at the end of students' tenure. I don't know about labs because I am an MBA student.

review_content.Placements: RBIITM is a new college of engineering, and placements are average. Almost every student from CSE got placed on the campus. The highest salary was about 8.5 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. The 14 acres campus has the academic block, girls hostel, recreation area and centre workshop. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jay Shriram Group of Institutions offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Jay Shriram Group of Institutions fee structure ranges between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Jay Shriram Group of Institutions offers Degree courses including 7 UG and 4 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Jay Shriram Group of Institutions has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Structural Engineering.

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Jay Shriram Group of Institutions is up to 474. Good thing to know is that Jay Shriram Group of Institutions has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: I have studied B.E Computer Science and Engineering in JSRGI, The College’s overall rating is not too good, but not too bad also. Faculty wise, it is the best college. The students who can study moderately can learn well. Placement is very poor. If you are ready to search for a job yourself, you can join this college without any doubt.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It provides both quality coaching with theoretical and practical knowledge and is well discipline.

review_content.Placements: During our course, more than 65 % of the students got placed. There is no donation for joining the institution. The fees are very less compared to other engineering colleges in the district. They charge Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 40,000 for tuition per semester. Job opportunities are vast. Companies like HCL, Cognizant, TCS, Mahindra, RCCL, etc., are the top recruiters. Above 70 % of the students got internships from our course in companies like RCCL, UCL, and in local construction and RMC companies. Project manager, site engineer, supervisor, and designer were top roles offered.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Very good engineering college.

review_content.Placements: 87% of students were placed in my course. The highest salary offered was INR 20,000, the lowest salary offered was INR 8,000 and the average salary offered was INR 14,000. Many companies like Wipro, Sait, Cobain, TNPL are the top recruiting companies.

faqs.question: Q: Is Jay Shriram Group of Institutions a known college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Jay Shriram Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I like our college because it has a beautiful garden and a piece of land on campus.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 90% of students are placed. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 35 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Walmart, Amazon, etc., visit our campus. The salary package offered is 22 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There is a huge canteen available where various types of food items are available. Individual laboratories exist for each subject. Our classrooms are neat and clean. All classrooms have air-conditioners. There is a huge library, which consists of every type of book with which you can gain knowledge on every subject.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015

content.Other: Number one there are not even a Single Professional faculty members. Number two They Doesn't stand by Their Words until the End of the Course. Number three Instead Of Being a faculty member Some of Them Behave like Obstreperous and riotous. Number four You May learn The Course 40% and the Remaining 60% You Will learn How To Tolerate the Pressure Given From Your Surroundings because They Mostly don’t pay attention to their classes. Number five they may Tell You That Some of the Facilities Are Getting Ready & Those Facilities will be available for our batch within 3 or 4 months, But Even if you study there for 4 years you will not see any of the facilities which they promised about.

college_info.college_name: Maharana Pratap College of Engineering: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Maharana Pratap College of Engineering is a private institute, established in 2009 in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh. Maharana Pratap College of Engineering is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 10 courses at UG and After 10th levels in 7 specialisations such as Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma in Full Time mode. Maharana Pratap College of Engineering fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,00,800 to 3,09,000. Maharana Pratap College of Engineering has an annual seat intake of 330 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Engineering. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Maharana Pratap College of Engineering provides Full Time programs at the UG and After 10th levels. These courses are available in stream like Engineering, and have a fee structure of around INR 1,00,800 to 3,09,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the After 10th programs include After 10th Diploma.

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.
faqs.question: What is the starting salary of an ECE engineer?

reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides a good environment to learn and explore.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2022 batch. Till now, many students got placed in companies like Mphasis, Daffodil, Centilytics, etc. The highest salary package offered is 7.2 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Informatica, GlobalLogic, etc., visit our college for placements. Top roles like software developer and system engineer are offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computer labs are very good. Classrooms are also digital with a LED where teachers present the topics. The library has a calm environment where you can read any book. Overall, it provides good facilities. There is a hospital on the campus, so if anyone has any problem, then they can go and get treatment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% to 90% of students got placed in good companies. The highest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, and the lowest salary is 0.9 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, RSPL, Lohia, etc. Students with above 60% marks got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good. All the facilities were available in our college, like a ground, very good classrooms, labs, a library, and workshops for different courses. Wi-Fi was not available for students, but it was provided for faculty members.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides a good learning environment, supportive faculty, and average placements.

review_content.Placements: Placement in our course is decent but not exceptional. Around 55–60% of students from my batch get placed through campus drives. The highest package is approximately 20 LPA, the average is around 3–4 LPA, and the lowest is about 2 LPA. Some students also secure internships at companies like local IT firms, startups, and service-based companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is satisfactory for a technical course. Classrooms are spacious. They are equipped with basic teaching aids. Computer labs function properly. Along with enough systems for practical sessions. Library has sufficient academic books and study space. Hostel facilities are average but manageable. Rooms are clean. Food quality is acceptable with limited variety.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: MPEC is good for students those who want only study.

content.Placements: The percentage of placement is totally based on off-campus/in-campus opportunities. Only when you are good at academics do the chances of getting in-campus placements increase. The highest package is 50 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. Internship opportunities are based on your skills, so focus on skills to get a good placement.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure, you can say, is quite good. There is no Wi-Fi in classrooms and the library. You have LAN available in computer labs for your PC. Actually, I am a day scholar, so I don’t know much about the hostel, but I have heard from my friends that the hostel is quite good and doesn’t have an AC hostel on our campus.

paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum.
To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college to utilise your knowledge and for placements.

review_content.Placements: It is an excellent college for B.Tech in computer science course because its placement cell is very good. This year, almost 26% of the students got placed in different companies. Many companies, like Amazon, Telco, Tata, Wipro, etc., visited here for placements. The lowest salary package offered this year is 3.8 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 30.28 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Tata and Wipro visited our campus for our course placements. About 76% of the students get an internship through our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure related to our course is good. There are various labs for every subject, and the college provides free Wi-Fi facility for every student inside the campus. Workshops are always conducted for the students. The hostel facility is good. There is a mess for students, and the Sodexo company take care of it. Food served is good. Hostel rooms are good, and two students are living in each room. The hostel has the facility of 18 different games and sports inside campus like a pool room, table tennis room, carrom room, TV room, marshal arts, RO, yoga room, study room, etc. The hostel also has the facility of the hospital.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, KKCT is superb as its infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: KKCT is one of the best colleges for placements. It provides many facilities. Many companies visit the college to offer placements. My seniors got good placements. Campus placement is a good opportunity for our life.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of KKCT is superb. Many parking places and canteens are available. It is one of the best colleges in Puttur. The college was established in 2008, and it was the only women's college available at that time. B.Tech, MBA, and pharmacy courses are also offered by the college these days.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members in KKCT are very good. I have gained good knowledge. The faculty members are very good at teaching. HODs are very good at teaching. It is one of the best colleges I have ever seen because I have learned a lot about computer science engineering. That's the reason I chose this college.

individual_reviews.title: The college has good and experienced faculty.

content.Placements: There are no placements in our college. No companies recruit students from here, and we need to search for jobs outside through social media or direct walk-in. The top roles offered are associate, process associate etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, computer lab, and library are available. Canteens are available outside. The college is near to the bus stand. The college provides a free period for students to participate in extracurricular activities like cricket, shuttle and other games. It is a good college for day scholars.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Doing B.Tech in this college, is waste of time and money.

content.Placements: There is no placement cell in the college. There are no placements in the college. Our seniors were not placed. There is no internship programme. No company visit the college for the placements. Campus selection is zero. Our college is very bad regarding the placements. After completing B.Tech, the students have to roam in search of the jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good. The building is small and insufficient. They are not even constructing another building for the students. The hostel facility is good. The food provided is not good.there are no medical facilities. The labs are also not good. Our campus is as big as a school. We have Wi-Fi in the college. The classrooms are not good.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has a very good infrastructure with great opportunities to learn differently.

review_content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi convenience, 4 practical labs, 2 computer labs, a library and a big ground in our college. There are the best medical facilities available 24x7. Boys and girls big gym facility and many other facilities are available in our college.

review_summary.college_name: Smt. S.R. Patel Engineering College, Unjha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good results all over Gujarat State.

content.Placements: About 20 percent of student was getting placement. Almost 100% of internships are from civil courses in any company. That college has Owen company for placement for civil engineering. The top roles in our course were the construction of buildings, bridges, payment, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has no more facilities for students causes 4 to 5 students in one room that is the main problem for a hostel. But the quality of food was so good. Cleanses of the canteen was good. In civil course had no Wi-Fi at college. No mobiles were allowed in college camps.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: They gave us theoritical knowledge not so much practical knowledge and this is the negative point.

content.Placements: There was an average percentage of students who got placed in our course. The salary offered is about Rs.70000 per month. About 10-20% of students get internships in such companies. Mostly, they offered for civil engineering. For other courses, they did not offer so much job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: There were good facilities available in our college like Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, etc. The facilities in the hostel provided were good. There were 20 to 30 rooms. In each room, 3 students live and there is a bathroom also. The quality of food was also good. Medical facilities and sports facilities were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has a very good infrastructure with great opportunities to learn differently.

content.Placements: In our college, around 40-50% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 2.4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.6 LPA. In our college, Ajay Infrastructure, Rachna Builders and many other companies visit to offer placements. Almost 30% of the students got selected from our course. Civil engineering, computer engineering and mechanical engineering are top engineering courses in our college.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi convenience, 4 practical labs, 2 computer labs, a library and a big ground in our college. There are the best medical facilities available 24x7. Boys and girls big gym facility and many other facilities are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college to provide placements for civil engineering students.

content.Placements: Around 40% of students got placed in our course. Ajay Engineering Infrastructure, Rachana, L&T, etc., companies came here. Civil, mechanical and computer engineering courses are offered. The packages ranged from 1.2 LPA to 3 LPA. 40% of students got internships in Ajay Engineering Infrastructure Private Limited.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is in round shape and has 2 floors. Each room is allotted for 3 students. Facilities like a table, mirror, 3 chairs, and 3 lockers are available in each room. Good quality food is available. Medical facilities are good. Sports facilities include cricket kit, badminton, carrom, chess etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of no placements.

content.Placements: I was a D2D student of 2016 batch. There are no placements or recruitments in our college, and they focus more on attendance than the recruitment process. None of the students got a job from our college because our college does not invite companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are very good. Labs, classrooms and library are very good. Wi-Fi is free, but mobiles are not allowed, so it is meaningless. Quality of food is average in the canteen. Sports and games are very good because every year events happen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good results all over Gujarat State.
reviews.review_text: Our college has no more facilities for students causes 4 to 5 students in one room that is the main problem for a hostel. But the quality of food was so good. Cleanses of the canteen was good. In civil course had no Wi-Fi at college. No mobiles were allowed in college camps.

reviews.review_heading: They gave us theoritical knowledge not so much practical knowledge and this is the negative point.
reviews.review_text: There were good facilities available in our college like Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, etc. The facilities in the hostel provided were good. There were 20 to 30 rooms. In each room, 3 students live and there is a bathroom also. The quality of food was also good. Medical facilities and sports facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a very good infrastructure with great opportunities to learn differently.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi convenience, 4 practical labs, 2 computer labs, a library and a big ground in our college. There are the best medical facilities available 24x7. Boys and girls big gym facility and many other facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to provide placements for civil engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is in round shape and has 2 floors. Each room is allotted for 3 students. Facilities like a table, mirror, 3 chairs, and 3 lockers are available in each room. Good quality food is available. Medical facilities are good. Sports facilities include cricket kit, badminton, carrom, chess etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of no placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good. Labs, classrooms and library are very good. Wi-Fi is free, but mobiles are not allowed, so it is meaningless. Quality of food is average in the canteen. Sports and games are very good because every year events happen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: All faculty members are knowledgeable and helpful. The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college is environment-friendly. The campus is huge. There are many types of equipment and huge laboratories on the campus. There are huge playground and gardens in the college. There are a huge canteen and book store on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Smt. S.R. Patel Engineering College, Unjha.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. Even the college offers the best environment as it is situated in the village. The campus is lush green, and I like it a lot. Even there is a temple of Lord Dattatreya. All labs and seminar halls are air-conditioned. There is also a huge auditorium hall.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Laboratories are very good. Classrooms are very good. Seminar halls are very good. An auditorium hall is very good with a seating capacity of 300 people. The library is very good. Our college celebrates sports week. Hostel rooms in college are good.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very small. There is no ground in our college for sports. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. The hostel does not provide the best food. It does not provide fast food. Our canteen prices are very high.

paragraphs: Sri Vinayaka Group of Institutions admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG level in streams includingEngineering and Medicine and Health Sciences.Sri Vinayaka Group of Institutionsadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asKCET, Karnataka 2nd PUC, and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,35,224for UG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.

review_content.Placements: I passed out from the college in the previous year with a good percentage. Most of the students opt for higher studies. One of our seniors got settled in America. Many engineering students get good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college offers good accommodation and a wealthy environment. The hostel is excellent, and the staff is friendly, helpful, and full of local knowledge. review_content.Faculty: We have good faculty members. I enjoyed a lot in science labs. Our college offers many courses like engineering, bachelor's degree for arts and science students. We are proud to be certified by this college with good knowledge about subjects because of our professors.

faq_section.introduction: The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh) admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

answer.text: D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.A.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.B.ComCandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognized as equivalent there to, from a recognized Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.MCACandidate must have passed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

overview_faqs.question: Is D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh) is a reputed institute for B.A., B.Com, B.Tech, B.Sc., MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.A., M.Com, M.Sc.. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Engineering, Science, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh) has a review rating of 4.3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.6 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 4.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the placements and hostel facilities, but the infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Nearly 40% of students are placed, with the highest salary being 16 LPA and the least being 4 LPA. Accenture and Infosys are among the top companies, with less than 20% placed in local companies like Accenture. Most students join software companies, and some end up doing work that is irrelevant to their course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in the course, but very bad in the hostel. The food served at the hostel is very bad. The washrooms are rarely cleaned, and the premises are a little like a dump yard. The hostel building shakes whenever a heavily loaded vehicle passes by side.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Review of D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh).

content.Placements: About 80% of students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Dr. Reddy's Laboratories and Hetero visit our college to hire students from our course. About 60% of students from our course got an internship. Top roles like quality analysis and quality control are offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good, and infrastructure is also good. Labs are good, and the library is also good. Classrooms are good in our college. The canteen is better for food, and it also serves hygienic food. Sports are most important in the college. It has a huge sports ground and a well-planned sports complex.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh).

content.Placements: I passed out from the college in the previous year with a good percentage. Most of the students opt for higher studies. One of our seniors got settled in America. Many engineering students get good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college offers good accommodation and a wealthy environment. The hostel is excellent, and the staff is friendly, helpful, and full of local knowledge. They give permission for the outing as well. Labs are cleaned daily, and rooms are spacious. We have huge rooms and good infrastructure.
content.Faculty: We have good faculty members. I enjoyed a lot in science labs. Our college offers many courses like engineering, bachelor's degree for arts and science students. We are proud to be certified by this college with good knowledge about subjects because of our professors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh).

content.Placements: In the academic year of 2019, nearly 350 students got placed in Infosys BPM Limited out of 500 students. 120 students got placed in Wipro Technologies. 8 out of 10 students are a part of NCC or sports. Every student is motivated to participate in social activities such as feeding the poor.
content.Infrastructure: DNR College is established in 5 acres of land, which provides secondary education to higher education like PG course (MBA, MCA and M.Sc). DNR college has 1-acre of playground, gym, sports area etc. DNR College also has an NCC unit. It has a huge library with nearly 1500 books

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Bhimavaram.

content.Placements: I am from 2015-2018 batch. Almost 95% of the students join in our course. The highest salary offered was 1 lac per month, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. About 80% of the students got selected in Infosys and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides super well-furnished labs, Wi-Fi facility and CCTV cameras. The college provides hostel facility, and I would rate 75% for food. There is a ground, and it is played for under-18 cricket matches internationally. Food is served in the college. The college provides canteens and books stores. It serves the best food in the college like Parotta. The principal is the best. It has the best rules, and all the students can be comfortable here. NCC is available here. It conducts fine arts selections at state-level performances. It has a big ground, and students will play for national levels.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for science and technology courses.
reviews.review_text: We had laboratories and innovative classrooms with Wi-Fi connections. They provided an attached broad-spectrum library. They provided a well-facilitated hostel. The food served in the canteen and mess was good. The hospital was available at our college. There were large playgrounds with games for both boys and girls to improve their fitness and health.

reviews.review_heading: Review of D.N.R College (DNRC, Andhra Pradesh).
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are provided by the college. We also have hostel facilities and a canteen. I spend most time in the canteen studying. The food served is more hygienic and tasty. They provide labs also.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only in computer labs and hostel as per usage. The library has high volumes, and the food served is good as per the quality and quantity. Sports and games are highly preferable. Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. Often medical facilities are available when it is necessary.

reviews.review_heading: The college is graded A by NAAC, and it is a culturalable college.
reviews.review_text: We have a very good culture in our hostel to provide a good quality of food and beds and for entertainment to use Wi-Fi. We have a playground in our hostel, gym, etc., to be good in PET for sports and games. They have books and canteen to work with a good library.

reviews.review_heading: Very helpful for a middle class family and students.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and that campus is good labs were good and they getting new equipment in labs they show practically more than theoretically. There is NCC in our college and our college giving first place to sports and encourage them.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfactory university in terms of teaching as well as placement.

review_content.Placements: The university offers average placement and average package neither too high nor too low. The maximum number of placements were from CS and IT branch. Internship opportunities were also numerous. GET graduate engineer trainee was the role offered by most of the companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university is situated at a place where it is surrounded by scenic beauty all around. It has a huge campus and it emphasised on sports and games. Despite being in a hilly area the quality of food was good. Hostel was equipped with facilities like Wi-Fi, medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Manav Bharti University is an abode in the snow with serene beauty and knowledgeable students.

review_content.Placements: There are hardly any placements until we graduated from college. Our professors used to tell us that it's better to learn the concepts before even applying them. It means that before even going to the corporate world, students must get good knowledge which is the arsenal for the battlefield of industry. The learnings can develop a new set of skillsets if one has an ample amount of knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's one of those few undergraduate colleges which has its distinct set of identity as far as its infrastructure is concerned. It is located at the peak of Himalayan trenches. This shining gorgeous campus is one of the best campuses you can find in the country. Starting from the campus which includes great Wi-Fi services, labs, smart classrooms, ample space in the library to a great plethora of sports and games facilities, everything is serene in that white snow of Solan district of Himachal Pradesh. One can definitely feel proud if they are studying on this campus.

review_summary.college_name: Manav Bharti University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The experience was good.

content.Placements: Actually I am a law student and there is no such placements in our course but in other course some students get placed but the package are very less and no big companies visits our campus for placements. Only around 30-40% of students gets placements from our university.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi speed is good but they don't provide that much amount of data to use. Library is huge and have lot of space and with all computer facilities in it. Mess food is not that good and also they don't have a big ground for sports activities which is kind of bad.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Facilities are average in our college.

content.Placements: From our B.Com course, about 100 students got placed from our college. The highest salary offered to us was Rs. 8,000 per month, while the lowest salary offered was Rs. 2,000 per month. Topmost companies visited our college after our final exams to hire us. About 60% of the students got jobs in those companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by our college were above average, but the campus was good. Our college didn't provide Wi-Fi facility, but classrooms were huge. The hostel was very small, but the food provided in the mess was very good and hygienic. Our college provides excellent medical facilities for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Satisfactory university in terms of teaching as well as placement.

content.Placements: The university offers average placement and average package neither too high nor too low. The maximum number of placements were from CS and IT branch. Internship opportunities were also numerous. GET graduate engineer trainee was the role offered by most of the companies.
content.Infrastructure: The university is situated at a place where it is surrounded by scenic beauty all around. It has a huge campus and it emphasised on sports and games. Despite being in a hilly area the quality of food was good. Hostel was equipped with facilities like Wi-Fi, medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Manav Bharti University is an abode in the snow with serene beauty and knowledgeable students.

content.Placements: There are hardly any placements until we graduated from college. Our professors used to tell us that it's better to learn the concepts before even applying them. It means that before even going to the corporate world, students must get good knowledge which is the arsenal for the battlefield of industry. The learnings can develop a new set of skillsets if one has an ample amount of knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: It's one of those few undergraduate colleges which has its distinct set of identity as far as its infrastructure is concerned. It is located at the peak of Himalayan trenches. This shining gorgeous campus is one of the best campuses you can find in the country. Starting from the campus which includes great Wi-Fi services, labs, smart classrooms, ample space in the library to a great plethora of sports and games facilities, everything is serene in that white snow of Solan district of Himachal Pradesh. One can definitely feel proud if they are studying on this campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The fee structure of our college is low, and the facilities provided are less.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities provided in the college are not good. In 2017, only 20 students got job opportunities through campus placement drives. I don't think that many companies visit the university during our placement season, so we are very much worried about our placements. The university needs to improve the placement facilities and should invite more companies to the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well-organised. There's no place to play because the people who visit the university park their vehicles in the playground. There are no garden and transportation facilities. There is no shed at the bus stop, and the management is not serious about the future of the university.

placement_data.title: Manav Bharti University Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: Manav Bharti University has a dedicated training and placement cell that invites companies for student-industry interaction and campus placements. The objective of the placement cell at Manav Bharti University is to provide employment opportunities and quality training to students. Apart from this, the placement cell organises seminars and pre-placement talks for students.

tables.context: Which companies are the top recruiters of D.Pharm

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Manav Bharti University - MBU?
faqs.answer: A placement cell of Manav Bharti University works with the organisations to organise placement drives. All full-time UG and graduate programmes are eligible for the placements. At Manav Bharti University, the placement is satisfactory. For the BA programme, Manav Bharti University (MBU) placement gave the highest salary range of INR 6 lacs annually. Top hiring firms include Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Dell, Infosys, DLF, Tata Motors, Bajaj Capital, TCS, ITC Foods Ltd., and Escorts. There has been no release of the placement report for Manav Bharti University. The domain with the highest number of Manav Bharti University students is operations, based on data collected from various web sources.

faqs.question: Which companies are the top recruiters of D.Pharm students at Manav Bharti University?
faqs.answer: Manav Bharti University DPharm placement 2024 has not been released yet. However, the MBU placement cell invites companies for student-industry interaction and campus placements. As per the overall MBU placements , the list of top recruiters who participated in the recent past is presented in the below-mentioned table: Manav Bharti University Top Recruiters Dell Infosys DLF Tata Motors Accenture Tech Mahindra TCS Bajaj Capital ITC Foods Ltd Escorts

faqs.question: What is the career scope after completing D.Pharma at Manav Bharti University?
faqs.answer: After pursuing DPharma from Manav Bharti University, candidates can either choose to pursue a BPharma by taking admission through lateral entry or they can also work in popular pharmaceutical companies. Students can also work for NGOs, community health centres, or medical clinics after pursuing DPharma from Manav Bharti University. However, there are various opportunities in the healthcare and pharmaceutical industry. They can work as pharmacy technicians or assist pharmacists in dispensing medications, managing inventory, and providing patient counselling.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Manav Bharti University - MBU?
faqs.answer: All the reputed organisations, including MNCs, come to the Manav Bharti University MBU for campus recruitment. L & T Infotech, TCS, Tata Chemicals Ltd., Apollo Tyres Ltd., Escorts, Mahindra & Mahindra, Tata Motors, Bajaj Capital, Havell's, Punjab Tractors Ltd., TCE Ltd., Birlasoft, HCL Technologies, Quarks, Tech Mahindra, Compare Infobase, Honda Siel Cars Ltd., Reliance Engg., Whirlpool, Convergys, Hutch, Reliance, WIPRO Technologies and so on. The University has constituted a placement cell which keeps a close relationship with Industry Sector.

faqs.question: What is the fee at Manav Bharti University - MBU for B.Tech. course?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the Bachelor of Technology course at Manav Bharti University - MBU is INR 77,000 (for 4 years). The duration of the course is 4 years. The actual fee may vary. Other hostel charges per annum are: Single Occupancy: INR 30,000 Double Occupancy: INR 24,000

faqs.question: What is the total fee for D.Pharm at Manav Bharti University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees to be paid for DPharm at Manav Bharti University have not been disclosed. However, the hostel fee for the DPharm programme ranges from INR 35,000 to INR 23,000. However, the mentioned fee is a combination of a number of components, such as the hostel fee, mess and other security deposits, etc. The mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the BPharma fee at Manav Bharti University?
faqs.answer: The Manav Bharti University BPharma fee is inclusive of various components. These components are tuition fees, hostel fees, and security deposits. The admission fee and security deposit are payable only once at the time of admission. The tuition fee for MBU BPharma has not been disclosed. They are still subject to change and, hence, are indicative.

reviews.review_heading: The experience was good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is good but they don't provide that much amount of data to use. Library is huge and have lot of space and with all computer facilities in it. Mess food is not that good and also they don't have a big ground for sports activities which is kind of bad.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are average in our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college were above average, but the campus was good. Our college didn't provide Wi-Fi facility, but classrooms were huge. The hostel was very small, but the food provided in the mess was very good and hygienic. Our college provides excellent medical facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory university in terms of teaching as well as placement.
reviews.review_text: The university is situated at a place where it is surrounded by scenic beauty all around. It has a huge campus and it emphasised on sports and games. Despite being in a hilly area the quality of food was good. Hostel was equipped with facilities like Wi-Fi, medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Manav Bharti University is an abode in the snow with serene beauty and knowledgeable students.
reviews.review_text: It's one of those few undergraduate colleges which has its distinct set of identity as far as its infrastructure is concerned. It is located at the peak of Himalayan trenches. This shining gorgeous campus is one of the best campuses you can find in the country. Starting from the campus which includes great Wi-Fi services, labs, smart classrooms, ample space in the library to a great plethora of sports and games facilities, everything is serene in that white snow of Solan district of Himachal Pra...

reviews.review_heading: The fee structure of our college is low, and the facilities provided are less.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well-organised. There's no place to play because the people who visit the university park their vehicles in the playground. There are no garden and transportation facilities. There is no shed at the bus stop, and the management is not serious about the future of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of Good staff.
reviews.review_text: Classroom and library is good but there is nothing more than this. The Wi-Fi are placed everywhere but not working properly labs are good but some instruments are not in working condition. Sports rooms are average, every year a cricket tournament man was organised by the University and we take part very happily in the tournament.

reviews.review_heading: Superb college any one interested can join this.
reviews.review_text: Not bad. It feels like home and totally covered by the hills. It has an amazing view at the top of the mountain. Classrooms are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has the perfect locality. I love to be in hill areas.
reviews.review_text: When we talk about the building, they are not interconnected to another building, but the faculty is almost in one room don't know why. The individual floor has an individual faculty room. The atmosphere of the college is very friendly to know we will talk about the pharmacy building seating arrangement, or the sense of the class is good.

Manav Bharti University situated in solan. It is a very good college in terms of study and overall development of college and it gives better atmosphere and its good academic and infrastructure and faculty members of college is very good and much experienced and college give extra activities to students and gives platform to perform better in every field. It is a very good college in terms of study and overall development of college and it gives better atmosphere and its good academic and infrastructure and faculty members of college is very good and much experienced and college give extra activities to students and gives platform to perform better in every field.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure campus
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and good atmosphere for studying. There is so many beautiful places. And good landscape also. So many students are studying in hostel and other students are staying in rented apartments. In our college hostel food are good. Free Wi-Fi campus and office staff also good .

Undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), and doctorate studies are offered at Manav Bharti University, Solan in a number of subject areas, including teaching, computer science, engineering, commerce, humanities and social sciences, and more. These courses have a few structure range of INR 50 K to INR 3 L. For the candidate's information, the tuition costs for the courses are listed below:
BCA - INR 1.3 L
LL.B. - INR 1.5 L
B.E. / B.Tech - INR 77 K
M.A. - INR 50 K
LL.M. - INR 1 L
B.A. LL.B. - INR 2.5 L
There are few other courses provided by the college, but the fee structure is not made public so far.

Manav Bharti University's fee structure various according to the course taken. Bachelor of Computer Applications BCA is a three-year undergraduate degree course in the field of computer applications/computer science. The tution fee for the course is INR 1.3 L. The fee structure for LLB is INR 1.5 L. The tution fee for B.E. / B.Tech is around INR 77 K. The total tution fee for the course B.A. LL.B is INR 2.5 L. The security payment (one time) hostel charge is INR 5 K. Single Occupancy rooms are availed at INR 30 K. The Double Occupancy and Triple Occupancy are INR 24 K and INR 18 K respectively.
