reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students were placed. The average salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. Many companies visit for placements and offer good packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure was good. All facilities were available on the campus. Canteen facilities were also available. It provides a hostel for boys and girls with a mess facility. The hostel security guard was available. Transport was provided, and a parking facility was available. The campus security guard was available in this college. The campus was very big. It also provides a library with several books, and the library staff was very helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Almost 40% of our batch got placements in well-reputed companies. From the civil engineering course, some students got selected, but most of the students are interested in self-employment. Electrical department and computer department students also got a good salary package. Jobs and placements are decent.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities available are college classrooms, practical room, laboratories, computer rooms, sports ground, canteen and parking. The canteen food is good, but the hostel mess food is average. Hostel rooms are average. There is a combined bathroom for all, but there is no separate bathroom for each room. There are no other facilities.

From the civil engineering course, some students got selected, but most of the students are interested in self-employment. Electrical department and computer department students also got a good salary package. Jobs and placements are decent.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities available are college classrooms, practical room, laboratories, computer rooms, sports ground, canteen and parking. The canteen food is good, but the hostel mess food is average. Hostel rooms are average. There is a combined bathroom for all, but there is no separate bathroom for each room. There are no other facilities.

The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Indira Institute Of Technology And Sciences admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    Indira Institute Of Technology And Sciences offers Degree and Diploma courses including 8 UG and 4 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Indira Institute Of Technology And Sciences has specializations such as After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Structural Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Indira Institute Of Technology And Sciences for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: Indira Institute Of Technology And Sciences courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Indira Institute Of Technology And Sciences goes up to 636.

reviews.review_heading: Indira Institute Of Technology And Sciences is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility was available, and the food served was good. There was a huge library, and the labs were good. There was a good canteen. Sports and games were encouraged. The hostel was neat and had good arrangements. The labs had a lot of equipment, but some were not working, it was the only problem in this college. During this time, the student doesn't have practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty and placements were bad in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are quite good. Every student gets a single cot and a blanket, making it comfortable. The food is also decent, with a variety of tiffins available daily; lunch and dinner are satisfactory as well.
